description: User picks PR — body must include full APD pipeline summary, not generic text
query: Pipeline done, push and open PR. Pick option 2.
expected_behavior: the PR body includes a Summary section with one-paragraph description of the change
the PR body includes an APD Pipeline section with spec, builder, reviewer verdict, adversarial counts, verifier, and duration
the PR body includes a Test plan section with concrete verification steps
returns the PR URL to the user; does not start a new pipeline cycle
